execution_protocol: Select earliest incomplete milestone with dependencies complete
Implement only that milestone scope unless blocked
Commit with M# prefix and push to origin/main
Update milestone status in this file

milestones.title: Foundation and Deployment
validation: npm run dev
npm run build
Pages deploy succeeds from main

milestones.title: Core Tick Engine and Save Model
validation: Reload restores run state exactly
30+ minute run stability

milestones.title: Resource and Formula Layer
deliverables: Prophet threshold and cult cost scaling
validation: Runtime formula outputs match manifesto constants
No global softcap logic present

milestones.title: Whispers Loop (Era I)
validation: Active play reaches Era II gate conditions
Decision cadence remains 30-60 seconds

milestones.title: Doctrine Loop (Era II)
validation: Cults and rivals create strategic tension
Era II to III gate is multi-system

milestones.title: Veil, Miracles, and Civilization Pressure (Era III)
validation: Veil 30-55 yields high-risk/high-reward play
Miracle spam self-limits via civ stability
Unraveling reachable through intended path

milestones.title: Offline Progression Engine
validation: No offline collapse
Offline Veil floor enforced at 15
Return state is coherent and playable

milestones.title: Ascension and Echo Trees
validation: Run 2 is structurally distinct
Echo builds create viable strategic variance

milestones.title: Social Memory and Lineages
validation: Prior-run decisions alter future conversion dynamics

milestones.title: Pantheon Layer (Run 2+)
validation: Alliance and betrayal are both viable with distinct tradeoffs

milestones.title: UI as Veil and Omen Log
validation: Readability progression is mechanically visible
Event feed avoids sterile system text

milestones.title: Audio as System Feedback
deliverables: Layered signal chain (dry bus + reverb bus + master filter)
Low-Veil drone and staged instability transitions
validation: Players hear destabilization before major visual consequences
Audio remains readable under Era III domain density

milestones.title: Ghost Echoes and Async Signatures
validation: Imported signatures produce recognizable world fingerprints
Core game complete without signature data

milestones.title: Architecture Layer and Remembrance Endgame
deliverables: All name letter conditions and tracking
validation: Remembrance path completable
Final choice remains intentionally ambiguous

milestones.title: Balance and Runtime Targets
deliverables: Timing and economy tuning for Revision B targets
Era pacing audit inside runs: Era II speed-up is tangible but not abrupt versus Era I
Regression tests for formulas and offline sim
validation: Run timing approximates 6.5h, 4h, 2.5h, 1.2h, 45m floor
No high-severity simulation regressions

milestones.title: Era UI Restructure and Disclosure Consolidation
milestones.notes: Consolidates PF-02 and PF-03 scope into a dedicated milestone for era shell structure, anti-clutter flow, and strict reveal behavior.
deliverables: Era-locked shell flow: Era I minimal, Era II ACTIVE/GROWTH(+constrained META content), Era III full ACTIVE/GROWTH/META
Era II tab contract: ACTIVE order is Whispers -> Influence meter -> Doctrine -> Doctrine Seeds; GROWTH order is Domains -> Rivals -> Threshold
Era II rivals collapse to one-line status when inactive and expand to full controls when active
Era II threshold sits at the bottom of GROWTH (not ACTIVE) and defaults to collapsed
ACTIVE tab prioritizes Cataclysm, rivals, whispers, and influence pressure in Era III
Unraveling gate as persistent strip in Era III
Echo trees constrained to META view; between-run systems removed from active flow
Theme token progression by era (data-era) for palette/texture/typography density shifts
Shared reveal helper enforcement for future-era disclosure
validation: Era III critical actions are accessible without long scrolling
Future-era systems are hidden until unlock
Core loop screens remain coherent at 375px width without horizontal overflow

milestones.title: Save Integrity and Recovery
milestones.notes: Must precede M14 balance tuning. Players must not lose runs during stress testing or normal play due to save corruption.
deliverables: Versioned save migration pipeline for schema changes
Secondary snapshot slot: auto-saved 'last good state' before each ascension and each era transition
Manual save export to JSON file (download)
Save import with version validation and conflict warnings
Graceful corruption recovery: detect bad state, offer rollback or fresh run with explanation
validation: Corrupted localStorage does not crash the game
Exported save can be re-imported and continues correctly
Schema migration from prior version produces valid state
Ascension snapshot correctly reflects pre-reset state

milestones.title: Instrumentation and Playtesting Telemetry
milestones.notes: Must precede or run parallel with M14. Balance tuning should be evidence-based. All telemetry is local-only unless opt-in is explicitly added later.
deliverables: Structured local event log: era transitions, collapses, ascensions, rival suppression, miracle use — each with timestamp and key state snapshot
Per-run summary object written to localStorage on ascension: total time, belief earned, echo gained, peak B/s, collapse count, miracle count by tier
In-game Stats page reading and displaying run history summaries
Optional console/JSON export for manual analysis during playtesting
Hooks for M14 regression tests to read instrumentation output
validation: Era transition events are logged with correct timestamps
Per-run summary is written correctly on ascension
Stats page renders run history without performance impact
Log does not grow unbounded: cap at last 20 runs

milestones.title: Accessibility and Mobile Resilience
milestones.notes: The 45-minute floor run and offline check-in model implies intermittent mobile use. This milestone ensures the game is completable on mobile without layout breakage or battery abuse.
deliverables: Responsive layout audit: all panels usable at 375px width without horizontal scroll
Touch target sizing: all interactive elements meet 44x44px minimum
Tick rate throttling when tab is backgrounded or device signals low power
Reduced-motion support: disable Framer Motion animations when prefers-reduced-motion is set
Keyboard navigation for all primary actions (Whisper, Recruit, Invest, Act, Miracle)
Focus management when new panels unlock progressively
validation: Full Era I loop completable on 375px mobile viewport
No layout overflow or hidden buttons at small sizes
Background tab does not spin CPU at full tick rate
All primary actions reachable via keyboard alone
Reduced-motion mode produces no animation jank

milestones.title: New Game+ Convergence Mode
milestones.notes: Run 8+ needs structural novelty beyond compression speed. Convergence is not a difficulty mode — it is a layered game state where prior-run echoes interact in ways that alter the run's shape. Design must not break the 45-minute floor or the ambiguous final choice.
deliverables: Convergence flag unlocked after completing Remembrance path once
Ghost interference layer: imported or locally-generated prior-run signatures passively alter domain synergy, faith decay timing, and rival spawn patterns in the active run
Accumulated betrayal/alliance history produces Pantheon disposition modifiers that compound across Convergence runs
Convergence-only omen log entries that reference prior-run events by name
Convergence does not alter core formulas or gate conditions — pressure is narrative and systemic, not numerical inflation
Optional: Convergence run summary screen showing which ghost echoes were active and their observed effects
validation: Convergence run is structurally distinct from standard run 8+
Ghost interference is perceptible but does not guarantee win or loss
Final choice presentation remains ambiguous and unresolved
45-minute floor is preserved under Convergence conditions
Convergence does not require M12 Ghost Echoes import to function (falls back to local prior-run signatures)

milestones.title: Documentation and Wiki Foundation
milestones.notes: Convert internal implementation documentation into a stable wiki-ready knowledge base and keep it synchronized with mechanics.
deliverables: Maintain docs/GAME_REFERENCE.md as formula-level implementation reference
Define wiki page map and ownership for ongoing updates
Publish first-pass wiki pages for era loop, formulas, prestige/pantheon/remembrance, and save/offline/telemetry troubleshooting
Add documentation sync validation to workflow guidance
validation: All implemented systems are documented with current formulas/constants
Internal reference and wiki pages are cross-linked and consistent
Mechanic changes are accompanied by MANIFESTO/roadmap/reference updates

post_final_improvements.title: Bulk Domain Investing Controls
scope: Add invest options per domain: +1, +10%, +25%, +50%, Max (Belief-bounded)
Show projected spend and resulting level/XP before confirm
Preserve single-invest option for fine control

post_final_improvements.title: Strict Era-Locked UI Disclosure
post_final_improvements.notes: This scope is formalized structurally under M20 for milestone-level validation.
scope: Hide all future-era systems until era unlock
Fix current leak: Cataclysm content must not appear in Era II
Add a shared reveal policy helper used by all panels

post_final_improvements.title: Anti-Clutter Layout Pass
post_final_improvements.notes: Promoted into M20 as a dedicated milestone track for shell-level UI restructuring.
scope: Reduce page scroll via docked tabs/section switcher
Collapse secondary panels by default after unlock
Move non-critical diagnostics to a compact Stats page

post_final_improvements.title: Runtime Formatting in Stats Page
scope: Format run time as days/hours/minutes/seconds
Keep primary HUD free of verbose timers
Ensure formatting consistency in offline summary and stats

post_final_improvements.title: Smoother Tick and Render Feel
scope: Separate simulation tick from UI paint rate where needed
Use interpolation/smoothing for displayed counters
Profile and remove frame hitching on long sessions

post_final_improvements.title: Omen Frequency and Authenticity Pass
scope: Reduce omen volume; prioritize milestone-significant events
Generate omen prose from event context with varied sentence structures
Add cooldown + de-duplication so repeated lines are rare

post_final_improvements.title: Progressive HUD Reveal and Explainability
scope: Hide Veil/Domain aggregate metrics until relevant unlocks
Introduce each metric with brief in-world explanation
Keep early UI near-minimal per manifesto progression intent

post_final_improvements.title: Run 1 Onboarding and Tutorial Veil
scope: Design the first 20 minutes of run 1 as a deliberate pacing artifact, not an afterthought
Introduce Belief, Influence, and Whispers sequentially with contextual in-world cues rather than tutorial popups
First prophet conversion moment should be marked as a narrative beat, not a silent threshold
Suppress non-relevant UI panels for the first 5 minutes to reduce initial cognitive load
Ensure Era I gate is reachable without external documentation or prior knowledge

post_final_improvements.title: Number Legibility and Large Value Formatting
scope: Implement consistent suffix notation: K, M, B, T for displayed values throughout all panels
Belief/s display should show at least 2 significant figures at all scales
Avoid raw integers above 9999 anywhere in primary HUD
Echo costs and totals use same suffix system for consistency
Milestone: no player should need mental arithmetic to understand their current resource state

post_final_improvements.title: Faith Decay Visual Indicator
scope: Add a per-prophet or global decay indicator that shows the current faith_decay multiplier
Visual should pulse or shift color as decay approaches penalty threshold, not just display a raw number
Indicator must appear only after faith decay has been mechanically explained to the player (Era I, first decay event)
Tooltip on hover: show time since last event and current multiplier value
Keep indicator compact; it must not dominate the HUD

post_final_improvements.title: Influence Spend Nudge System
scope: When Influence is within 10% of cap and no action has been taken in 45+ seconds, show a subtle ambient signal (not a notification) that spend is being lost
Signal must be in-universe: e.g., an omen log line, a visual shimmer on the Influence meter — not a UI toast or alert
Nudge is suppressed if player has no affordable actions available
Nudge frequency is capped: at most once per 90 seconds
Aligns with manifesto spend-before-cap behavior design intent

post_final_improvements.title: Rival Threat Legibility
scope: Show active rival strength as a relative threat level, not a raw number, until Era II is established
Display estimated follower drain rate alongside rival entry in the event log
Add a brief in-world description of each rival's character on first appearance (one line, not a dossier)
Suppression cost UI should show whether player can currently afford suppress vs. convert
Rival panel visibility follows era-locked disclosure rules

post_final_improvements.title: Collapse Recovery UX
scope: When Veil collapse or civ collapse occurs, present a brief narrative moment before resuming the tick — a 2-3 second pause with an in-world omen line describing what broke
Post-collapse state should clearly show what was lost (follower count before/after, prophets lost) in the omen log
Immunity timer (if Echo upgrade owned) should be visually apparent, not hidden in stats
Recovery path (what the player should do next) should be inferrable from visible UI state without documentation
Collapse must feel consequential without feeling arbitrary or unreadable

post_final_improvements.title: Echo Tree Visual Clarity
scope: Echo tree nodes should show current rank, max rank, and cost-to-next in a single compact view
Purchased nodes visually distinct from affordable/locked/unavailable states
Fibonacci cost progression should be readable at a glance — show next 2 costs, not just next 1
Group Echo upgrades by mechanical theme (faith, prophet, veil, era gates, etc.) with unlabeled visual separation
Tree must not require scrolling to see all currently relevant options

post_final_improvements.title: Act System Result Clarity
scope: Show projected belief_gained before committing to an act, using current B/s and act_duration
Post-act result displayed in omen log with narrative framing, not raw formula output
Domain match bonus should be visibly reflected in the projection (e.g., 'resonant domain' indicator)
act_floor echo upgrade effect should be visible when active
Acts with low projected return should not be hidden, but de-emphasized in ordering

post_final_improvements.title: Offline Return Narrative Polish
scope: Offline return summary should lead with a single evocative in-world sentence before showing deltas
Deltas presented in order of narrative weight: followers, prophets, veil change, belief gained
Avoid showing raw seconds elapsed; use human-readable duration (e.g., '3 hours, 14 minutes')
If faith decay dropped significantly offline, surface that prominently as a priority action for return
Summary screen should be dismissible with one tap/click and not reappear until next offline session

post_final_improvements.title: Domain Synergy Feedback
scope: Show active domain_synergy bonus visibly when cult output is being calculated
Matching domain pairs highlighted in domain panel (subtle, not noisy)
Tooltip or expandable section showing which pairs are matched and their synergy contribution
When a new cult is formed or a domain is invested in, briefly surface whether synergy changed
Keeps domain investment decisions feeling meaningful rather than opaque

post_final_improvements.title: Veil Mastery Zone Indicator
scope: Veil meter should visually communicate the three zones: safe (above 55), optimal (30-55), danger (below 30)
Zone coloring or texture changes, not just a number — the player should feel the zone, not calculate it
Current veil_bonus multiplier displayed as a live value next to or within the meter
Collapse threshold marked on the meter with a subtle indicator (becomes visible after first collapse or Era III unlock)
Zone indicators follow progressive reveal: safe/optimal distinction unlocks in Era II, danger zone in Era III

post_final_improvements.title: Pantheon Relationship State Legibility
scope: Each Pantheon entity shows current disposition (ally / neutral / hostile) with one-line contextual flavor
Betrayal history flagged permanently on the entity entry — in-universe language, not 'BETRAYED' label
Domain poisoning effect visible on affected domains with source attribution
Alliance benefits summarized in one line per entity, not buried in stat deltas
Pantheon panel hidden until run 2 per era-locked disclosure rules

post_final_improvements.title: Remembrance Conditions Tracker
scope: All 8 Name Letter conditions tracked in a persistent, cross-run panel
Conditions shown as in-world fragments, not mechanical labels — e.g., 'A domain remembered beyond forgetting' not 'Domain level 10'
Completed conditions visually distinct; uncompleted ones show progress where quantifiable (e.g., 3/5 civ rebuilds)
Panel hidden until at least one condition has been completed or the player has completed run 1
Conditions that require specific runs or Pantheon actions flagged as requiring preparation, without spoiling exact mechanic
